items.name: 🎄 Christmas Hello Kitty Phone 🎄

Celebrate the season with extra cuteness on your Roblox avatar with the Christmas Sanrio Phone Case! 📱❤️ Featuring your favorite Sanrio characters like Hello Kitty, My Melody, and friends dressed in festive holiday outfits, this phone case brings the joy and warmth of the holidays to your style.
